name: Alzheimer's Disease
definition: A progressive neurodegenerative disease characterized by cognitive decline
etiology: Genetic factors, beta-amyloid deposition, tau protein hyperphosphorylation, cholinergic system impairment
symptoms: Memory decline, cognitive dysfunction, behavioral abnormalities, decline in daily living skills
treatment_principles: Cholinesterase inhibitors, NMDA receptor antagonists, symptomatic treatment, cognitive rehabilitation
prevention_advice: Keep brain active, control cardiovascular risk factors, social participation, healthy diet
